title: Tangy Turkish Bananas Kuru Fasulye
description: A unique Turkish dish featuring fried ripe bananas, tempered with chocolate and spices, providing a tangy and energizing taste experience, while being low in calories.
instructions: Peel the bananas and cut them into 1-inch pieces.
Heat the olive oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
Fry the banana pieces until they are golden brown and crispy.
Remove the fried bananas from the oil and place them on a paper towel to drain excess oil.
Melt the dark chocolate chips in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30-second increments, stirring between each interval.
Temper the melted chocolate by stirring in the pomegranate molasses, cinnamon powder, cardamom powder, and salt.
Add the fried banana pieces to the tempered chocolate and stir until they are evenly coated.
Drizzle the honey over the chocolate-covered bananas and serve immediately.
